review_text: Great place to relax
Friendly staff, clean cabin, great location
Great for a powered site close in the middle of everything 650m to the fabulous lagoon

Had great time here luckily not as busy.  Location very handy to most things. If hiring cabin take own towels if staying longer we did washing im there machines for 5 dollars a pop. Same with dryer.  Won't service cabin everyday but thats ok.

We stayed at a powered spot for one night. First of all, the location is great. Only 650 meters from the Yeppoon Lagoon, esplanade and restaurants.

Amenities were very clean. It was quiet at night. We were a bit taken aback by the fact that the reception is behind bars. It made us a little apprehensive of the area.

However, the lady at reception was very friendly at check-in and gave us lots of helpful information about the area.

There is no Wifi. We know that is a conscious choice of this caravan park. It would have lifted this review to a 5 star one, as it is nice to be able to do online banking, check important emails or plan the route for the next day.

Conclusion: we would stay here again. :)
Amazing clean facilities, perfect location, quiet at night and Dave is an absolute legend! Thanks guys, we’ll be back 👍👍👍
Hot,very wet
We stayed in a powered site. The bathrooms were clean and the service at reception was great. Restaurants and bars are a short 10 minute walk away. We really enjoyed our stay.

We verblijven hier 1 nacht met onze camper en het is een super gezellige, overzichtelijke camping. De eigenaar is heel vriendelijk en de Powered sites zijn top. In 10 minuten loop je naar de lagoon en de boulevard/ het strand.
Central location in Yeppoon - walking distance to Yeppoon Lagoon and foreshore/beaches, cafes and restaurants.  Modest cabins but affordable and very friendly service

If you pay a week stay in advance then do not get sick! You will lose your money.She is rude and unfriendly.
Never.ever have I experienced such rules

Super camping, très bien équipé ! Les douches sont très propres, en plus d’être très bien pensées pour poser ses affaires et tout, parfait pour notre famille avec quatre enfants. Vous y trouverez de quoi laver le linge (apportez votre lessive) et de quoi l’étendre au soleil (!), tellement pratique. Le propriétaire a été aux petits soins avec nous, merci ! Un camping à taille humaine, qui a vraiment tout ce qu’il faut.

The cabin was nice had everything needed. Was clean the lock on the screen door didn't work. It was easy to find and quiet. Service on arrival was good staff member was friendly a male staff member greeted me at the cabin to show light switch and aircon.
The staff were informed due to a social even my male friend would be here temporarily while he took my other friend and I to a social event and pick us up. A male staff member came the cabin completely unannounced and for no reason at all about 8-8:30pm appeared to be intoxicated. This was very unsettling due to him knowing a single lady was supposed to there alone. This staff then continued to harass my male friend asking if he was going to course trouble.
I will not stay again and I don't recommend anyone else to either particularly if you are alone.
Amazing experience, great location. Walking distance from the beach! Thanks guys

Top little tidy quiet caravan park.
Highly recommended.

Nice little caravan park, quite expensive 60$ for just a pitch, no water or plug in, warm showers and a happy smile when guided to our pitch so if you’re looking for somewhere quick it’s ok, but want power or water there’s another park down the road called beach side which has more to offer
Friendly,clean,dog friendly,close to town,footy ground nearby for your morning and evening stroll, shall be back later in 2026

Perfecte locatie op 10 minuten lopen van de lagoon in het centrum. De beheerders van de camping waren uiterst vriendelijk. Enige minpunt is dat er voor de unpowered plekken  geen plekken zijn op water te tappen, behalve in the laundry die om 19:00 sluit, ook is er geen wasbak om in af te wassen er is wel een bbq. De unpowered plekken worden zo volgepropt dat wij met onze buren niet tegelijk de auto deur open konden doen, dit verschilt per nacht de ene nacht staat het veel voller dan de andere.

Excellent campground, very well located and pleasant. The owner is super friendly and very accommodating.
Highly recommended!

Dave the park manager does an excellent job running the park 👍🏼
Best place to stay in Yeppoon
One night stay in a cabin, staff helpful and amazing, had a fantastic stay, very close to the waterfront.
A small caravan park with long term residence mixed in with overnighters. Pleasant staff and clean amenities. Great water pressure in the shower
Great stay, walking distance to everything, spotless amenities, very friendly, helpful managers, loved it!
The caravan park is neat, tidy and quiet .
Awesome little Caravan Park, close to everything, spotless ammenities management excellent

Amazing little Park|Immaculately clean and well kept ! Good price . Small park  but very friendly . Beautiful area and close  to town , restaurants and the beach . We will definitely be back soon!! It truly is a little piece of paradise . Dog friendly too ! So nice  to spend time here
Loved our short stay will be returning in a couple weeks for a much longer stay.
Fabulous little park. Friendly staff clean amenities and within walking distance to town oh and not too pricey 👌

This is a small, but well maintained, quiet and spotlessly clean caravan site close to the centre of Yeppoon.  It doesn't offer WiFi or have a dump point, like other larger sites, but the overnight rates reflect this. Staff are friendly and helpful.
Very nice caravan park this is our second visit here very clean and tidy would recommend a stay
Very well maintained park very friendly but not centre of town or SHORT walk to cafes and lagoon this was misleading and this is why I chose this park only to find it wasn’t close
No dumpstation no wifi

Convenient location - clean amenities good hot showers - Danni and Dave ever so helpful.  Will definitely be back. Not an issue but no dump site but one located less than 5 minutes at the Tourist Info Centre.

We stayed here for 1 month. Large powered site with concrete slab. Clean amenities. Very happy and helpful owner, manager and cleaner. So close to shops, Esplanade and beach. Dog friendly. We will be back, and would recommend this park to anyone who wants to relax in Yeppoon.
Friendly service.  Thank You
The park is in a great location,the cabins are adequate.
Clean, tidy park with easy access. Close to water front and town centre.
Great place great help will be back.

Paid normal price for a powered site .Booked a few months ago. Got there and owner put us in an unpowered grass camp area. Power was provided by an orange surge protector box with a plastic bucket over it that was shared by 2 sites. Once 3rd occupied I was asked to move my powered cord to bbq area.Water required 2 long hoses. My neighbour had to cart water in buckets as his hose would not reach tap.
NO dump point  but on site man was helpful in undoing a cabin sewer pipe for me. Thanks nate.👎
Owner was a friendly lady & Yeppoon is a beautiful spot BUT this park let's it down badly. Needs updating.
Not recommended.

Friendly, caring staff. Danni and Dave were always helpful and very obliging. Shower pressure was great and water was always hot. Very clean facilities and park. Walking distance to shopping centres, hotels, restaurants and beach front. A great place to stay. Thank you Danni for fitting us in. We look forward to staying with you again next July.

Great little park with friendly staff. Simple setup
without pool/playground/dump point. We enjoyed 4 nights in an unpowered site. Bathroom and laundry always nice and clean. Would stay again. Handy location.

Stayed here 3 days, love the small friendly atmosphere.  Darnie the owner was lovely and helpful. If you want high tech park for kids go to the discovery one down the road. If you want to be near town and love the old fashioned feel.  This is for you
Great quite park clean and friendly

Cost lots, all powered sites. $45/nt
Very clean amenities. Laundry and clothes lines. Some minor road noise. Close to shops.

Location Location Location, PERFECT.
Site size
AWESOME
amenities
BEST SHOWERS EVER
Suggestion, invest in a square for eftpos, have radio or music in the amenity block, no one wants to know what's going on in the next cubicle. Look forward to coming back soon
Great caretakers. Nice spots with a concrete slab. Showers and toilets were proper. Walking distance to the shopping center.
Central

Incredibly cramped caravan park.
While it is a convenient location and we stayed several nights, it is a bit of a shame, in such a beautiful location, Yeppoon, there is such a rubbish park.  With all of the permanents and a rude owner.   There are much better places on offer in the area.  Not a happy place.   Rude owner, I hope he is replaced, and the park cleaned up.  Avoid for now.

I stayed in one of the cabins for a week and it was the best experience I’ve ever had and I will definitely be back there again soon and it was so clean and peaceful and relaxing I wish I could give them 100 stars

Absolutely beautiful caravan park. Quiet location close to blue lagoon swimming pool and beach.  Easy walk into cafes, restaurants and town.
The staff are
amazing, friendly and helpful.
We will definitely be back to this beautiful caravan park.
Thank you for making our holiday so lovely .

Amazing little caravan park with cabins as well. Great value for money. A short walk to town. Great for large and small caravans as well as camping area with a cooking area laundry and toilets and showers pet friendly too
Great location, clean amenities, no dump point,  great sized sites with slab, friendly owner and staff, reasonable prices, easy walk into town and the lagoon
Small caravan park with lovely staff. Within walking distance to the pubs, would stay there again. Dog friendly.

A very small and intimate caravan park, easy walking distance to Yeppoon CBD. Caretakers are lovely people and do advise guests that it is a "no-frills" CP. That said, the sites are well looked after, and the aging ablutions are very clean. Happy to return.

I paid $40 for one night for myself, car and rooftent on an unpowered site.
There is a BBQ area under a roof, laundry and bathrooms.
No WiFi or camp kitchen. You are very close to your neighbours.
Very friendly staff.
Super clean and tidy.  Very welcoming hosts.  Small and older but we had a very good experience.  Would certainly recommend to others.

We had unpowered site  $40.   Stayed Sunday & Monday nights,  on the fence line of walking path, locals heading home drunk,  swearing & yelling at each other but soon moved on.  Dog friendly,  walk to beach & shops, facilities older but immaculately clean.

Lovely park. Short walk to the board walk and pool at the beach. Close to shops. Lovely place for caravanners who don't need all the bells and whistles. Great amenities.  Definitely will return. Thank you. 😊
clean amenities, friendly staff,  no dump point but it is virtually around the corner.
Quiet, very clean. Close walking distance to shop beach. Definitely come again.
Clean facilities,no camp kitchen no WiFi,bit expensive
We stayed 6 nights and the park was full each night, plenty of room between each van. Amenities were spotless and laundry has a little library in it. Would definitely stay there again.
